source: https://www.gocoastguard.com/careers/enlisted — the Coast Guard's 21 published enlisted ratings.
method: Joined on code, falling back to the rating name where a record carries prose in its code field. FAIL CLOSED.

jobs.reason: The Coast Guard publishes this as one of its 21 enlisted ratings. A civilian reaches it without prior military service — on a guaranteed A-School contract at enlistment, or by serving as a non-rate and striking for the rating.

The Coast Guard Band is a real direct-entry enlisted path, filled by audition — but the official auditions page returns HTTP 403 and we could not confirm the current entry requirements from any source. We will not offer a job whose entry path we cannot verify. Contact the Coast Guard Band directly.
